title: Evening At Pops
overview: Evening at Pops was an American concert television series produced by WGBH-TV. It was one of the longest-running programs on PBS. The program was a public television version of a variety show, performed by the Boston Pops Orchestra. It was taped at Symphony Hall in Boston, Massachusetts.

episodes.title: Evening At Pops - John Williams, Boston Pops Orchestra
